head.title: Favicon.Svg (duplicated) - Bolt.new

header.class: flex shrink-0 select-none selection-accent items-center pl-5 pr-4 border-b h-[var(--header-height)] z-21 fixed w-full backdrop-blur-[17px] border-bolt-ds-borderOutline

div.class: flex grow-1 basis-60 items-center gap-2 text-bolt-elements-textPrimary

nav.class: relative h-full grow-1 shrink-0 justify-center hidden lg:flex animated opacity-0

ul.class: flex flex-row gap-3 h-full list-none m-0 p-0

a.class: h-full flex text-sm font-medium items-center px-1 bg-transparent text-bolt-ds-textSecondary [&:hover:where(:not(:disabled))]:text-bolt-ds-textPrimary lg:px-2.5 no-underline
h-full flex text-sm font-medium items-center px-1 bg-transparent text-bolt-ds-textSecondary [&:hover:where(:not(:disabled))]:text-bolt-ds-textPrimary lg:px-2.5 no-underline

button.class: h-full text-sm font-medium px-1 text-bolt-ds-textSecondary [&:hover:where(:not(:disabled))]:text-bolt-ds-textPrimary lg:px-2.5 group flex items-center gap-1 bg-transparent border-0 cursor-default data-[state=open]:text-bolt-ds-textPrimary

a.class: h-full flex text-sm font-medium items-center px-1 bg-transparent text-bolt-ds-textSecondary [&:hover:where(:not(:disabled))]:text-bolt-ds-textPrimary lg:px-2.5 no-underline
h-full flex text-sm font-medium items-center px-1 bg-transparent text-bolt-ds-textSecondary [&:hover:where(:not(:disabled))]:text-bolt-ds-textPrimary lg:px-2.5 no-underline

div.class: flex grow-1 basis-60 justify-end items-center gap-3 animated opacity-0

button.class: flex items-center justify-center font-medium shrink-0 min-w-0 max-w-full rounded-md focus-visible:outline-2 disabled:op-50 relative disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors bg-bolt-ds-inverseSurface/10 [&:hover:where(:not(:disabled))]:bg-bolt-ds-inverseSurface/15 text-bolt-ds-textPrimary gap-1 text-xs px-2.5 h-8 whitespace-nowrap min-h-10 sm:min-h-6

flex items-center justify-center font-medium shrink-0 min-w-0 max-w-full rounded-md focus-visible:outline-2 disabled:op-50 relative disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors bg-bolt-ds-brand [&:hover:where(:not(:disabled))]:bg-bolt-ds-brandHighlight text-bolt-ds-onNeutral focus-visible:outline-bolt-ds-brandHighlight gap-1 text-xs px-2.5 h-8 whitespace-nowrap min-h-10 sm:min-h-6
flex items-center justify-center p-2.5 rounded-md focus:outline-none bg-transparent
